meaning: n.谒师所(印度锡克教徒的礼拜场所)
examples: Sikhs opened their gurdwara for the coppers to change their clothes in.
Afterward, I'll go to the gurdwara that 200 Sikhs cleaned yesterday as our sewa.
The Shiromani Gurdwara Parbandhak Committee (SGPC), the top Sikh religious administration, termed the Ravidassia declaration unfortunate.
The Oak Creek temple, or gurdwara, opened in 2007 and has a congregation of more than 350.
